name: Persimmon Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream sugar and butter together.
2. Add eggs and persimmon pulp. Mix well.
3. Add walnuts, coconut, lemon extract, and spices.
4. Sift flour, baking soda, and baking powder into the mixture.
5. Add to the mixture.
6. Drop by teaspoons full onto a greased and floured cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for 15 - 20 minutes.
Notes:
I do not use the coconut or the lemon extract since I do not normally have these things around, and I have never floured a cookie sheet. They turned out fine.
